title: Perfectly Pan-Seared Greek Peas Gratin
description: A gooey and delicious gratin dish with sugar snap peas, perfect for a weeknight dinner or special occasion. This flexitarian-friendly recipe is sure to please a crowd.
instructions: Preheat the raclette-grill to medium-high heat.
Trim the ends of the sugar snap peas and cut them in half.
In a large skillet, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat.
Add the flour and whisk to form a paste.
Slowly pour in the Greek yogurt, whisking constantly.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2 minutes, until thickened.
Add the Parmesan cheese, dill, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
Add the sugar snap peas to the skillet and toss to coat with the sauce.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated raclette-grill and cook for 4-6 minutes, until the top is golden brown and the peas are tender.
Serve the peas hot, garnished with additional dill if desired.
